urdu transliteration text:
Pahunchay sirhane bhai ke jab shahe karbala
Ghazi ne apni aakhri saanson may di sada
Ummul Banin sa
english translation text: When Imam Husayn AS reached by the body of Abal FadhlHazrat Abbas in his last breath said this

urdu transliteration text:
Oh my master, don't tell my mother Ummul Baneen
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
Ummul Banin sa

Sharminda sakina se ho bahot
Mai pani lekar aa na saka
Ummul Banin sa
english translation text: That I am ashamed That I couldn't bring water for Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Oh my master, don't tell my mother Ummul Baneen
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
Ummul Banin sa

Maa ne jo sikhaye bachpan me Wo yaad hai sab aadaab mujhe Nazdeek khade rehna us ja
Shabbir jahan baithe jaake
english translation text: What my mother taught me when I was young, I have remembered all those habits"Go and stand nearby where Shabbir is sitting”

urdu transliteration text:
Is waqt magar khadim tera,
Taazeem ko teri uth na saka
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
english translation text: But right now, this slave of yours can't even stand up in your honorOh my master, don't tell my mother ummul baneen

urdu transliteration text:
Har laash pe girke kehte thay, Kya tum hi ali ke bete ho
Maloom hai kitni mushkil may, Khaimo se yahan tak pahunchay ho
english translation text: He fell onto every body and asked, are you the son of AliI know with so much trouble, you have come from the tents to here

urdu transliteration text:
Abbas se milne ki khaatir, Zehmat jo uthayi hai maula
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
english translation text: To meet Abbas, you have endured a lot of trouble my master, Oh my master, don't tell my mother ummul baneen

urdu transliteration text:
Kis tarha katay baazu mere, Maqtal may bata dena beshak
Mai zee se zameen par kaise gira, Amma ko suna dena beshak
english translation text: How my arms were cut, in the battlefield, tell her that for sureHow I fell from my horse to the ground, tell her that for sure

urdu transliteration text:
Abbas ke girne se lekin, zainab ke giri thi sar se rida
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
english translation text: But by my falling how the veil of Zainab fell from her headOh my master, don't tell my mother ummul baneen

urdu transliteration text:
Ye soch ke ran may roti hai, baazu se lipat kar meri wafa
Ye baat garan guzregi bahot, amma ki tabiyat par aaqa
english translation text: Thinking of this she cries in the battlefield, my loyalty hugging my arms. This matter will hurt my mom a lot

urdu transliteration text:
Gar haath hue pani se mere, aur aap ka asghar pyasa raha
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
english translation text: That my hands got wet with the water, and your Asgher remained thirstyOh my master, don't tell my mother ummul baneen

urdu transliteration text:
Oh my master, don't tell my mother ummul baneen
Maula maa ummul baneen se mat kehna
Ummul Banin sa
